_comment: Per-module line-coverage ratchet (audit 2026-06-16). Keys are 3-segment module paths (src/handlers/<module>); the gate enforces each floor against EVERY file in the module, so a floor cannot exceed the module's lowest-covered file (repos/schemas drag mixed modules down). Floors are set just below each module's current minimum file line% to prevent regression. function=0 everywhere because schema files legitimately have 0% function coverage. To lock handler-level gains independently of repos, the gate needs finer-grained (per-file glob) keys — tracked as follow-up.
_comment_w3_audit: Wave-3 peripheral: deleted the fake-db illusion repos/audit.repo.test.ts (makeMockDb scripted chains) AFTER the in-module real-PG createScratch suite (audit.repo.integration.test.ts) landed S1-S5 — logEvent persistence + enum/org invariants, buildWhereConditions filter SQL + findMany/count, archive/purge retention state-machine + getAuditStatistics, verifyIntegrity tamper-detection over persisted rows + DB-fetch path, listAuditLogs org-scope + self-audit e2e. Every deleted assertion's intent maps to a surviving real-PG assertion (no unique branch lost). audit.repo.ts measured 99.05% line WITHOUT the illusion (was 99.05% WITH — the real suite, not the mock, was already carrying it). Full-suite module-min line% ~85.1 (audit.schema.ts); floor HELD at 80 (now honestly real-PG backed, not illusion-inflated). Product decisions surfaced (known-gaps): no append-only DB trigger, purge ignores per-row purge_after.
_comment_b4_elections: Wave-2 B4 realtime-admin: NEW real-PG createScratch harness (elections.repo.integration) proves create/get/list/CHECK 23514, nominee CRUD, secret-ballot anonymization projection (WF-077), vote tallies GROUP BY + distinct voter count, 23505 double-vote backstop, and the BR-33 cancel cascade (withdrawAllNominees/voidVotesForNominee/countNomineesByPosition). Deleted the two fake-db illusions (elections.repo.test + elections.repo.nominees.test — 'no real Postgres needed') now fully superseded; listNominees personName leftJoin is covered real-PG by member/governance election-lifecycle.integration; repo.update by election-status-cascade.integration. Full-suite module-min line% ~77.4 (elections.schema.ts); the unwired orphan handlers (castVote/createNominee/updateElectionStatus) are incidentally 93-100% covered, no drag. Floor HELD at 70 (well below min).
_comment_b3_email: Wave-2 B3 feedback: queue + template repos gained real-PG createScratch/integration suites (queue.repo.integration + queue.retry-deadletter.integration + queue.transitions.integration + template.repo.integration); suppression.repo migrated to the createScratch harness (old hand-DDL suppression.repo.integration deleted). Deleted the mock-only queue.repo.test + template.repo.test illusions; extracted template's pure Handlebars/validation logic to template.repo.unit.test. Full-suite module-min line% ~62.9 (queue.repo.ts — its scheduled/cleanup query branches stay unscoped); floor HELD at 50 (comfortably below min, no inflation).
_comment_member_domain: member + association:member floors raised Wave-1 batch-1 after the real-PG integration harness (createScratch) landed: converted the fake-db repo tests (chapters/compliance/credentials/directory/dunning/special-assessments/institutional-membership/dues-payments/membership/credits) to real Postgres. Measured module-min line% then ~59 (assoc:member) / ~58.8 (member); floors set ~4-7pt below for CI variance.
_comment_b3_notifs: Wave-2 B3 feedback: notification.repo.integration un-gated off 'if(CI)return' onto the createScratch harness; fan-out CONTRACT proofs added (notification-fanout-contract + notification-fanout-bulk integration); inbox-lifecycle integration (fire→persist→list→read→unread-count); REAL BUG fixed — migration 0080 set notification.organization_id NOT NULL (locked by notification.org-not-null.integration). Kept the pure app-logic notification.repo.test (org-id guard / preference-suppression / category map — no SQL claim). Full-suite module-min line% ~89.8 (notification.schema.ts), lowest non-schema ~95.7; floor raised 30→50 (mid-tier target, well below min for CI/full-suite variance, matches booking/assoc:ops).
_comment_communication: Wave-1 batch-4: converted communication.repo.integration.test.ts off the 'if (process.env.CI) return' gate to the isolated createScratch harness, so it now RUNS in CI (no shared-public-schema contention). Added feed-post.repo.integration. Module-min line% in CI is now ~80.4 (feed-post.repo.ts), up from the prior ~11.5 CI-only figure — floor raised 10→75.
_comment_b4_comms: Wave-2 B4 realtime-admin: comms repo layer standardized onto createScratch (comms-repos.integration) with real PG enum types (chat_room_status/type, message_type, member_role) + the real chat_room_members_unique constraint + 22P02 enum-domain drift proofs; default-channels + autoJoinOrgChannels real-PG suite; WS send persist-half (no-org path derives org from room → NOT NULL invariant). Deleted the two mock illusions (chatMessage.repo.test + chatRoom.repo.test) — every assertion (org-derivation, atomic messageCount/setActiveVideoCall claim FIX-014, findUserRoomsPage AND-participants + strict org PD-2, buildWhereConditions org-or-dm, validateMessageContent pure helper) is reproduced in the integration suite. Newly gated (was ungated). Full-suite module-min line% ~73.8 (comms.schema.ts); floor set 65 (just below min, CI headroom).
_comment_b4_platformadmin: Wave-2 B4 realtime-admin: findEnforcementFlags un-skipped onto real-PG (3-table tier/org/flag resolution wired through the gate precedence resolver — surfaced the tier-slug-vs-UUID contract: feature_flag tier rows key on the pricing-tier SLUG, so a UUID-keyed tier flag is silently invisible to enforcement, recorded as a known-gap); getNationalChapterDetail real-PG suppression + aggregation; exact-data national chapter drill-down e2e. REAL BUG #2 fixed (S4): isPlatformAdmin in utils/national-access.ts used exact-equality and 403'd the comma-separated seed super-admin role — now split(',')+includes. Module-min line% ~75.5 (createSubscription.ts); newly gated at the mid-tier 50 (was ungated; comfortably below min, matches convention). NOTE: exportDashboardReport.ts carries the same exact-equality role check but is an UNWIRED orphan (no route in routes.ts/app.ts/registry) — left unfixed by design (see ROADMAP carry-forwards).
_comment_b4_storage: Wave-2 B4 realtime-admin: storage-repos.integration migrated onto createScratch (REAL BUG — migration 0081 set stored_file.organization_id NOT NULL); BR-31 SVG suite repointed from a sanitize-illusion to the real MIME-allowlist block control; upload→complete→download lifecycle proven against real persisted state. Full-suite module-min line% ~64.7 (listFiles.ts); floor raised 15→50 (mid-tier target, ~15pt below min for CI variance, matches booking/assoc:ops/email).
_comment_w3_onboarding: Wave-3 peripheral: onboarding.repo.integration migrated off the 'if(process.env.CI)return' raw-Pool/public gate onto the createScratch harness so it RUNS on the gate; added 23505 per-org UNIQUE + 23502 org_id NOT-NULL constraint proofs, M01-004 step ordering + jsonb dedup/sort BRs, final-step completion + onboarding.completed emit-once contract, getOnboardingState officer-gate + 404 vs real repo. Full-suite module-min line% ~92.9 (onboarding.schema.ts); floor raised 15->85 (~8pt below min for CI variance; far above the peripheral-40 target). Product decision (known-gap): onboarding.completed event has ZERO consumers (fires into the void) — surfaced as an unconsumed-event contract test, NOT silently given a consumer.
_comment_booking: Wave-2 B1: bookingEvent.repo gained a real-PG createScratch suite; booking/timeSlot/scheduleException repo integration tests un-gated from 'if(CI)return' onto createScratch; slotGeneration + getNextBookableTime unit-covered (latent minBookingHours/advanceBookingDays bug fixed); booking lifecycle slot-release + DB CHECKs + notification fan-out covered. Measured module-min line% ~62 (booking.schema.ts); floor raised 5→50 (the mid-tier target, ~12pt below min for CI variance).
_comment_assoc_ops: Wave-2 B1: 5 fake-db repo tests (events/training/committee/committee-task/accredited-provider) converted to real-PG createScratch suites (fakes + __fake-db.ts deleted); awardTrainingCredit BR + completeTrainingEnrollment workflow + register-and-pay→settle→refund seam covered. Full-gate module-min line% ~64 (committee.repo.ts); newly gated at the mid-tier 50 (was ungated).
_comment_w3_jobs: Wave-3 peripheral (M15 Job Board): jobs.repo.integration migrated off the 'if(CI)return' raw-Pool/public gate onto createScratch + un-gated; repo constraint/enum/default proofs, cross-org IDOR seam for createJobApplication/updateJobApplication, BR-37 listExpired/extendPosting characterized at repo level. Full-suite module-min line% ~87.5 (jobs.schema.ts); floor raised 5->80 (~7pt below min, far above peripheral-40 target). Product decisions (known-gaps, characterize-only — NO silent build): BR-37 expiry cron is dead code (postings do not auto-expire; p2-deferred); dup-application race has no unique(person_id,posting_id) index (two concurrent applies both persist today) — both recommended as follow-up migrations, out of floor scope.
_comment_w3_marketplace: Wave-3 peripheral: 3 repos (vendor/listing/order) migrated off hand-rolled tx-rollback-on-public + brittle prototype-restore onto createScratch + repos registered in src/test-utils/preload-pristine.ts (prototype-pollution fixed by registration, NOT deletion); vendor/listing/order FSM + JSONB containment + cross-org guards proven against real PG. REAL BUG fixed (S6): getVendor.ts had a cross-org IDOR (returned a vendor regardless of x-org-id) — red-tested then org-scoped to mirror the sibling mutate-handler guards. Full-suite module-min line% ~86.6 (marketplace.schema.ts); floor raised 5->80 (~6pt below min, far above peripheral-40 target). Product decisions (known-gaps, characterize-only): order FSM dead-states (confirmed/refunded un-driven), no DB CHECK on quantity/price.
_comment_b2_content: Wave-2 B2 content: reviews/surveys/documents gained real-PG createScratch suites (shared content-fixtures.ts) — constraint/cascade/workflow proofs replacing fake-db illusions (deleted reviews createReview.test/reviews-handlers.test + surveys/documents repo fakes). Measured module-min line%: reviews ~55.6 (review.schema.ts) -> floor 50; surveys ~36.1 (survey.repo.ts — its findMany/publish/close/admin-list/analytics methods remain UNSCOPED by B2, the binding gap -> floor 30, follow-up to reach 50 needs survey.repo depth); documents stays 70 (min ~81 after fake deletion, comfortably above). No number-chasing; floors set just below each module's lowest file.
_comment_r4_3_surveys: R4-3 (2026-06-23): the B2 follow-up. survey.repo.ts's UNSCOPED lifecycle methods (publish/close/closeExpiredSurvey/deleteDraft/update/updateAnalyticsSnapshot/findManyWithPagination) now have real-PG depth in repos/survey.repo.integration.test.ts (status-transition guards proven against persisted rows). Module-min line% rose 36.1 → 63.96 (survey.repo.ts still the binding file, all other survey files 74%+); floor raised 30 → 50 with headroom.
_comment_w3_advertising: Wave-3 peripheral: new advertiser.repo real-PG harness + 3 repos migrated onto createScratch + repos registered in src/test-utils/preload-pristine.ts; getAdForPlacement serve-gating (cross-org leak), creative approval gate + sponsored-label override, reportAd auto-pause + admin notification fan-out — all over real PG. REAL BUG fixed (S3): member_ad_opt_out had no unique(organization_id, person_id) -> TOCTOU duplicate opt-outs + optIn straggler left a member silently opted-out (consent/privacy). Fix = migration 0082 (pre-backfill dedupe keeping min(opted_out_at) then add the unique index) + addOptOut ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + optIn delete-ALL. Full-suite module-min line% ~88.5 (advertising.schema.ts); floor raised 5->80 (~8pt below min, far above peripheral-40 target). Product decision (known-gap): creative 'pause' = revert-to-pending semantics.
